title: Senior Plant Manager at Alstom India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Alstom India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Alstom India in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India:
Alstom India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
